title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 139.360 - Levy and sale of goods under distraint
text:
139.360.  Levy and sale of goods under distraint. — In case any person shall refuse or neglect to pay the tax imposed, the collector shall levy the same by distraint and sale of the goods and chattels of the person who ought to pay the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 14010) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12333; 1919 § 13246; 1909 § 11734
